name: Player Abilities
desc: Sets the player's abilities (creative flying, god mode, etc).

fields.name: flying
fields.desc: Whether the player is currently flying

fields.name: allowFlying
fields.desc: Whether the player can initiate flight

fields.name: creativeMode
fields.desc: Whether the player is in creative mode

notes: The flying flag can be toggled by the client via C13PacketPlayerAbilities, but only if allowFlying has been previously set.

implementation.overview: Sets player abilities. Modules: Flight (detect allowFlying), GodMode (detect invulnerable).
